insight.title: My Insights
insight.subtitle: A personal reflection on how you spend your time
insight.performanceDesc: Study time, productivity, and focus over {{period}}
patternItems: Shorter focus sessions show better quality
areaItems: Break durations often exceed planned time
experimentItems: Replace one evening session with morning

weekly: You perform best on Tuesday and Thursday mornings.
Late-night activities continue to affect your next-day productivity.
Reading remains your most consistent habit.
monthly: Your focus dips noticeably after extended gaming sessions.
Week 4 was your strongest week this month.
Morning hours remain your most productive window.

aiFull.weekly: Over the last 7 days, you've been remarkably consistent with your study habits. Your strongest days are Tuesday and Thursday, where your productivity consistently peaks. Morning hours (9–11 AM) show your highest focus levels, and you tend to complete more tasks when you start your first session before 10 AM. However, late-night activities on Fridays often reduce your completion rate the following day. Overall, this was a solid week — your discipline is building.
aiFull.monthly: This month shows a clear upward trend in your study consistency. Week 4 was your strongest, with a 13% improvement over Week 1. Your most productive time remains the morning block, and you've maintained a healthy balance between focused work and rest. One pattern worth noting: your focus dips noticeably after extended gaming sessions. Taking shorter breaks and setting session limits could help maintain evening productivity.

insight.aiPoweredDesc: Great progress! Productivity improved by 8% and you've maintained a 7-day streak. Your focus peaks between 9–11 AM. Consider scheduling lighter tasks on Fridays when focus naturally dips.

task-completed.title: Task Completion
task-completed.tooltip: How many ongoing tasks you've already completed right now
task-completed.description: Shows completed vs total ongoing tasks — tasks that are currently happening right now. A task is ongoing if its start time has passed but its end time hasn't (start < now < end). The ratio tells you how many of those ongoing tasks have already been marked Done.

steps.title: What It Measures
steps.text: The numerator is how many ongoing tasks you've marked Done. The denominator includes tasks with start time ≤ today ≤ end time plus tasks with status 'In Progress'. If no tasks are ongoing right now, it shows 'No On Going Task'.

steps.title: How to Improve
steps.text: Plan realistic daily task counts. Break large tasks into smaller ones to build momentum. Use the Productivity Calendar to schedule focused time blocks for each task.

productivity-score.title: Productivity Score
productivity-score.tooltip: Ratio of productive vs total tracked time today
productivity-score.description: Your productivity score is the percentage of tracked time today that you spent on Productive activities vs Unproductive ones. Only activities marked with a productivity level count toward this score.

steps.title: How It's Calculated
steps.text: The score = (productive minutes) ÷ (productive + unproductive minutes) × 100. Only activities with a productivity level set (Productive or Unproductive) are included — Neutral activities are skipped.

steps.title: What Counts as Productive
steps.text: When creating an activity, you can set its Productivity Level. Activities labeled 'Productive' add to the numerator; 'Unproductive' ones add to the denominator. The percentage shows your ratio of quality focused time.

steps.title: Keep in Mind
steps.text: Neutral activities (like lunch, commuting, breaks) don't affect the score. The goal isn't 100% — a balanced day with rest and focused work is healthy and sustainable.

habit-relics.title: Habit Relics
habit-relics.tooltip: Equip, track, and evolve your personal growth relics
habit-relics.description: Equip meaningful growth relics that remind you of who you're becoming. Each relic tracks a daily habit you've committed to — update your progress and watch your streak grow.

steps.title: Equipping Relics
steps.text: Choose relics that resonate with your current goals. Each slot represents a daily practice you're nurturing.

steps.title: Tracking Progress
steps.text: Log your progress each day. The streak counter builds momentum and gives you a visual sense of consistency.

steps.title: RPG Inspiration
steps.text: Think of relics as your character's equipped items. They shape who you are — one daily habit at a time.

weekly-insights.title: Weekly Insights
weekly-insights.tooltip: AI reflections on your productivity and emotional patterns
weekly-insights.description: Weekly Insights analyze your productivity patterns, emotional trends, and journal reflections to give you meaningful perspective on your week.

steps.title: AI-Powered Analysis
steps.text: The AI reviews your completed activities, tasks, and journal entries to identify patterns you might miss.

steps.title: Productivity Trends
steps.text: See how your energy flows across the week — which days you're most productive and what drains you.

steps.title: Reflection Prompts
steps.text: Each insight includes a gentle prompt to help you reflect and adjust your approach going forward.

home-dashboard.title: Home Dashboard
home-dashboard.tooltip: Your personal command center for growth and productivity
home-dashboard.description: The Home Dashboard brings together your daily inspiration, quick actions, weekly overview, and habit relics in one calm, focused space.

steps.title: Daily Inspiration
steps.text: Start each day with a meaningful prompt or reflection to set your intention.

steps.title: Quick Actions
steps.text: Jump into journaling, productivity planning, or a reflective AI conversation with one click.

writing-assistant.title: AI Writing Assistant
writing-assistant.tooltip: Smoothen, format, or restructure your journal writing
writing-assistant.description: Three intelligent tools to refine your journal writing while preserving your voice and the editor's rich formatting.

steps.title: Smoothen — Light Cleanup
steps.text: Gently removes filler words, stuttering, and speech noise. Preserves your exact wording and personality — just cleaner.

steps.title: Auto Format — Rich Structure
steps.text: Analyzes your content and applies real rich text formatting: headings for topic shifts, lists for sequential thoughts, and proper paragraph spacing. Your words stay exactly the same — only the structure improves.

steps.title: Restructure — Deep Refinement
steps.text: Rewrites your thoughts with deeper emotional clarity and flow. Preserves your intent and voice while making your writing more articulate.

emoji-autofill.title: Emoji Auto Fill
emoji-autofill.tooltip: Let AI suggest emotionally relevant emojis for your journal
emoji-autofill.description: Click Auto Fill and the AI analyzes your entire journal — mood, tone, topic — then suggests three emotionally intelligent emojis to visually capture the vibe.

steps.title: Emotional Understanding
steps.text: The AI reads beyond keywords — it understands the emotional atmosphere and chooses emojis that feel connected, not random.

steps.title: You're in Control
steps.text: Auto Fill never overwrites your choices. You can remove, replace, or keep the suggestions however you like.

voice-journaling.title: Voice Journaling
voice-journaling.tooltip: Record your thoughts naturally, then enhance with AI
voice-journaling.description: Speak your journal instead of typing. Record, transcribe, then use the AI toolbar to smoothen, format, or restructure your spoken words.

steps.title: Record
steps.text: Tap Record and speak naturally — like you're talking to a close friend.

steps.title: Transcribe
steps.text: Stop and tap Transcribe. Your speech becomes text, placed directly in the editor.

steps.title: Enhance
steps.text: Use Smoothen to clean up speech artifacts, Auto Format for structure, or Restructure for deeper clarity.

productivity-calendar.title: Productivity Calendar
productivity-calendar.tooltip: Schedule activities, manage tasks, and organize your week
productivity-calendar.description: A visual week calendar where you can plan time-blocked activities, set deadline-driven tasks, and adjust everything with drag-and-drop.

steps.title: Week View & Navigation
steps.text: The calendar shows one day at a time in a vertical 24-hour timeline. Use the day picker row at the top to jump between days, the left/right arrows to move week-by-week, or click the month name to pick any month. The 'Today' button returns you to the current day.

steps.title: Adding an Activity
steps.text: Click the '+ Add' button in the top-right and select 'Activity', or right-click any empty time slot and choose 'Activity'. You can also double-click an empty spot on the grid and type inline — no modal needed. Set the title, time range, priority, and color.

steps.title: Activity vs Task — What's the Difference?
steps.text: An Activity is a time-blocked event with a start and end time — like 'Gym 9–10 AM'. You can resize it by dragging its edges. A Task has a deadline — like 'Assignment due Friday'. It shows a start block on your schedule plus a deadline marker on the due date. Tasks cannot be resized (fixed 1-hour duration).

steps.title: Activity/Task Insertion by Voice
steps.text: Click '+ Add' > 'Use Voice' or right-click > 'Use Voice'. Record your plan naturally — say 'Gym tomorrow at 7 PM' or 'Database assignment due Friday' — and the AI autofills the form. Review and submit.

steps.title: Fixed vs Reschedule Mode
steps.text: Toggle between 'Fixed' mode (blocks stay where you put them — drag to reposition) and 'Reschedule' mode (drag adjusts your schedule without resistance). Press CTRL+K to switch modes quickly. The toggle button lights up blue in Reschedule mode.

steps.title: Move and Resize Activity
steps.text: Double-click and hold any activity block, then drag up or down to move it to a different time. To resize, hover over the top or bottom edge until you see the resize handle, then drag to change duration. A live tooltip shows the current time as you drag.

steps.title: Edit, Change Status, and Delete
steps.text: Right-click any block and choose 'View Details' to see full info, edit, or delete it. From the right-click menu you can also quickly change its status to To Do, In Progress, or Done without opening the modal.

steps.title: Undo & Redo
steps.text: Use the undo (↩) and redo (↪) buttons in the top toolbar to reverse or reapply any action — creating, deleting, moving, resizing, or editing. Handy when you accidentally move or delete an event.

steps.title: Auto Sync
steps.text: Click the 'Auto Sync' button to synchronize your calendar with external task sources. A sweep animation crosses the timeline as activities are fetched and merged. The button glows and the icon spins while syncing — no need to refresh.

smart-suggestions.title: Smart Suggestions
smart-suggestions.tooltip: AI-powered recommendations to optimize your productivity
smart-suggestions.description: Smart Suggestions analyze your calendar, task load, and energy patterns to recommend meaningful adjustments to your week.

steps.title: Intelligent Recommendations
steps.text: The AI identifies opportunities — like rescheduling low-energy tasks to your peak hours or breaking down large tasks.

steps.title: Productivity Guidance
steps.text: Get insights about your productivity patterns, such as which times of day you're most effective.

voice-scheduling.title: Voice Scheduling
voice-scheduling.tooltip: Speak your plan — AI fills the form automatically
voice-scheduling.description: Use your voice to create activities and tasks. Speak naturally, and the AI intelligently fills the form — you review and submit.

steps.title: Speak Your Plan
steps.text: Say something like 'Gym tomorrow at 7 PM' or 'Database assignment due Friday'. The AI understands dates, times, and types.

steps.title: Review Before Saving
steps.text: The AI never writes to your calendar directly. You always review the pre-filled form and make adjustments before submitting.

right-click-calendar.title: Right-Click Calendar
right-click-calendar.description: Right-click anywhere on the calendar to add activities, create tasks, or open voice scheduling — all without leaving your view.

steps.title: Context Menu
steps.text: Right-click a time slot or date to open a context menu with quick options for that specific moment.

steps.title: Quick Add
steps.text: Add an activity or task directly at the clicked time — the form auto-fills with the selected date and time.

ai-personalities.title: Spill AI Personalities
ai-personalities.tooltip: Choose how your AI companion responds to you
ai-personalities.description: Switch between three distinct AI personalities — each designed for a different kind of conversation.

steps.title: Empathic Listener
steps.text: A warm, understanding presence. Best when you need to be heard without judgment.

steps.title: Problem Solver
steps.text: Clear, logical, and solution-oriented. Helps you untangle complex situations.

steps.title: Motivational Coach
steps.text: Energetic, encouraging, and direct. Perfect when you need a push forward.

forward-journal.title: Forward Journal
forward-journal.tooltip: Bring your journal entries into a reflective AI conversation
forward-journal.description: Select a previous journal entry and forward it into your Spill AI conversation. The AI reads your entry and uses it as context for a deeper reflective discussion.

steps.title: Select a Journal
steps.text: Click the Forward Journal button and choose an entry from your journal list.

steps.title: Reflective Discussion
steps.text: The AI understands your journal context and can help you explore, unpack, or reflect on what you wrote.

voice-input-spill.title: Voice Input
voice-input-spill.tooltip: Speak your thoughts naturally to the AI
voice-input-spill.description: Use voice input to speak your messages to Spill AI instead of typing. Your speech is transcribed and sent as your message.

steps.title: Speak Naturally
steps.text: Just talk like you're having a conversation. The AI will receive your transcribed message and respond.

steps.title: Seamless Flow
steps.text: Continue the conversation naturally — voice and typing work together seamlessly.

relic-archive.title: Change Relics
relic-archive.tooltip: Equip, unequip, and manage your habit relics
relic-archive.description: The Change Relics modal lets you curate your equipped relics — choose which ones to wear into your day, and which to keep in your archive vault.

steps.title: What Is the Archive
steps.text: The Archive is your vault of unequipped relics — all the habits you've created but aren't actively tracking right now. Scroll through them to find the relic you want to equip next.

steps.title: Ordering the Archive
steps.text: Use the Order buttons to sort your archive — by Name alphabetically, by Progress (highest completion first), or by Created date. Helps you find the right relic quickly.

steps.title: Equipping a Relic
steps.text: Drag any relic from the Archive onto one of the three orbital slots on the right. Each slot represents a daily practice you're committing to.

weekly-overview.title: Weekly Overview
weekly-overview.tooltip: See your performance for the week at a glance
weekly-overview.description: The Weekly Overview shows your productive hours, task completions, and daily trends for the current week.

steps.title: What Is the Weekly Overview?
steps.text: This is your weekly performance dashboard — it shows how much focused work you've done this week, how many tasks you completed, and how your productive time breaks down across each day.

steps.title: Navigating Weeks
steps.text: Use the left and right arrows next to the date range to view previous or future weeks.

steps.title: Daily Bar Chart
steps.text: Each bar represents one day of the week. The taller the bar, the more productive time you logged that day. Today's bar is highlighted.

steps.title: Weekly Stats Summary
steps.text: Total Hours is the sum of all productive time tracked this week. Tasks Done counts how many tasks you completed. Average Day shows your average productive hours per day.

update-progress.title: Update Progress
update-progress.tooltip: Channel progress into your equipped relics
update-progress.description: Select a relic from the roster, then add progress or reset it entirely. Changes are applied when you click 'Channel Energy'.

steps.title: Relic Roster
steps.text: The roster lists all your relics — equipped ones first, then the rest. Click any relic to select it, then use the controls on the right to add progress or reset it.

steps.title: Controls & Committing
steps.text: With a relic selected, type a number in the input to add that many points to its progress. Use the Reset button to zero it out. Click 'Channel Energy' to commit all pending changes at once.

hero.title: Mindly
hero.subtitle: Your AI-Powered Companion to Think & Grow

philosophy.tagline: A system for becoming more intentional and aware

why.label: Our Philosophy
why.title: Why We Built This
why.ideaPara1: Most productivity apps focus on only one side of the equation.
why.ideaPara2: Some help you become more productive. Others focus only on emotional wellbeing. We believe both matters.
why.emphasis1: Productivity without reflection can lead to burnout.
why.emphasis2: Reflection without action can lead to stagnation.
why.ideaPara3: We wanted to build a place where planning and self-awareness coexist. A second brain for planning. A companion for reflection. A space where you can organize your life and talk about what is on your mind when you need support.
why.forIntro: This app was built for people who want more than a to-do list.
personaDescs: People who journal and learn from their experiences.
People actively working toward becoming better.
People who feel overwhelmed, lost, or uncertain.
checklistItems: You want to understand your habits
You want both productivity and emotional support
You want clarity in your daily life
why.notForText: team collaboration, enterprise management, or corporate project tracking. This application is built for individuals.
why.speechEnd: We wanted to build something that helps you understand yourself too.

cards.title: Productivity Manager
cards.desc: Intelligent time blocks that adapt to your energy levels. Focus on what matters.

cards.title: Goal Setting & Journaling
cards.desc: Write with purpose. Set intentions that stick. Your journal becomes a map of your growth.

cards.title: AI Integrated Chat
cards.desc: A thinking partner that listens, reflects, and helps you untangle complex thoughts.

cards.title: Weekly Improvement Insights
cards.desc: Gentle, data-informed reflections on your patterns. See where you thrive.

events.title: Code Review

events.title: Team Standup
events.desc: Daily sync with the engineering team.

calendar.overlayDesc: Sign up to create activities, set deadlines, and organize your week with AI-powered scheduling.

entries.title: Morning Creative Flow
entries.preview: I feel most creative in the morning. The quiet hours before the world wakes up let my thoughts wander freely, and today's session was particularly productive...

entries.title: Understanding Procrastination
entries.preview: Realized that my procrastination isn't laziness — it's a signal that the task feels too big. Breaking it down into tiny steps helped me actually start...

entries.title: Setting Daily Intentions
entries.preview: New intention: be present. Not just in meditation, but in conversations, during meals, and while walking between meetings. The moments in between matter most...

pricing.subtitle: Start for free and unlock advanced productivity tools when you're ready.
pricing.valueDesc: Get personalized insights, AI-assisted planning, and premium coaching tools designed to help you build consistency and achieve your goals.

AI helps organize schedules and suggest optimal planning.

Access multiple coaching styles inside Spill AI.

finalCta.title: Ready to think clearly?
finalCta.desc: Start your journey with Mindly. A calmer, clearer, more intentional way to think, work, and grow.
